zh.lifeSummary: 當Arnold I Von Scheyern於從1057年到1070年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆也時，他的父親Otto I. von Scheyern52歲，母親Haziga von Dießen43歲。他與Beatrix von Reipersberg結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1104年。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Scheyern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name for someone from Scheyern, Bavaria.

variants.name: Scheuer
meanings: German: from Middle High German schiur(e), German Scheuer ‘barn, granary’, a topographic name for someone who lived near a conspicuous barn or near a tithe-barn. It is also a metonymic occupational name for an official responsible for receiving the tithes of agricultural produce rendered.

nameMeanings.name: Arnold
meanings: Saxon, Latin: Faithful to his honour; help in war, helping lord; powerful lord.

en.lifeSummary: When Arnold I Von Scheyern was born from 1057 to 1070, in Scheyern, Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Otto I. von Scheyern, was 52 and his mother, Haziga von Dießen, was 43. He married Beatrix von Reipersberg. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1104.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arnold I Von Scheyern est né du 1057 au 1070, à Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Otto I. von Scheyern, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Haziga von Dießen, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix von Reipersberg. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1104.

de.lifeSummary: Als Arnold I Von Scheyern von 1057 bis 1070 in Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otto I. von Scheyern 52 und seine Mutter Haziga von Dießen 43. Er hat Beatrix von Reipersberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1104.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Arnold I Von Scheyern è nato il da 1057 a 1070 nel Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Otto I. von Scheyern, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Haziga von Dießen, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix von Reipersberg. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1104.

ja.lifeSummary: Arnold I Von Scheyernがから1057年まで1070年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス プファフエンhオフン アン ダー イルムシェイエルンで生まれた時，父Otto I. von Scheyernは52歳，母Haziga von Dießenは43歳であった。Beatrix von Reipersbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1104年に死去した。

ko.Scheyern, Germany: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 p파펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 슈예른
ko.Scheyern, Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 p파펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 슈예른
ko.lifeSummary: Arnold I Von Scheyern(이)가 1057년 부터 1070년 까지 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 p파펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 슈예른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otto I. von Scheyern(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Haziga von Dießen(은)는 43세였다. 그는 Beatrix von Reipersberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1104년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Arnold I Von Scheyern nasceu de 1057 a 1070, em Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Otto I. von Scheyern, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Haziga von Dießen, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix von Reipersberg. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1104.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arnold I Von Scheyern родился с 1057 по 1070 в местности щиирн, ландкрис пфаффенофен ан дир илм, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Otto I. von Scheyern было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Haziga von Dießen, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix von Reipersberg. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1104 г.
